seoTitle: San Bernardino City Unified Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: San Bernardino City Unified 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 4 first day, Jun 4 last day, Thanksgiving, Winter Recess, Spring Break, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: San Bernardino City Unified starts the 2025-2026 traditional school year on August 4, 2025 as a minimum day. The last day of school and graduation date is June 4, 2026. Thanksgiving Recess runs November 24-28, Winter Recess runs December 22-January 9, and Spring Break runs March 23-April 3.

calendarFaqs.q: When does San Bernardino City Unified start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: SBCUSD starts school on Monday, August 4, 2025. The calendar marks it as a minimum day.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SBCUSD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 23 through Friday, April 3, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for SBCUSD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school and graduation date is Thursday, June 4, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Recess for SBCUSD 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Recess runs Monday, December 22, 2025 through Friday, January 9, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 4, 2025 and is marked as a minimum day.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: SBCUSD lists a two-week Spring Break for 2025-2026.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school and graduation date is June 4, 2026.
